title: The v2 stack — wired into the composition

beats.caption: Compose: Model Router fills the Orchestrator slot; the whole composition resolves clean
beats.expectedScreen: Compose overview, station 01 Orchestrator = Model Router, header capabilities resolved, Armory 18, sidebar Views lists Improver and Model Router

beats.caption: Armory: 18 Fittings — the new Model Router, Improver, Knowledge and Codex / Gemini runtimes
beats.expectedScreen: the Armory grid with the Knowledge card highlighted, alongside Gemini runtime, Improver, Model Router cards

beats.caption: Codex & Gemini are stationed as invocable runtimes — routed to as secondary targets, no UI of their own
beats.expectedScreen: the Codex runtime per-Fitting overview page, heading 'Codex runtime', PROVIDES runtime, VIEWS section noting it ships no UI

beats.caption: Knowledge federates memory + projections behind one contract — switch the runtime, never lose context
beats.expectedScreen: the Knowledge per-Fitting overview page, heading 'Knowledge', PROVIDES including memory-store

segments.caption: Live: the own-port views are registered, and the composition resolves with zero capability issues
segments.expectedScreen: terminal: the views API lists model-router and improver among registered fittings, and the composition's capabilityIssues is an empty array []

segments.text: One composition: orchestrator, runtimes, knowledge, improver
segments.subtitle: every piece visible in the UI and resolving clean
